'''鈭歵-th-l-n''' ('''katathlenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jacobinize|jacobinize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-th-l-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jacobinize|jacobinize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-th-l-n
|-
! Lemma
| katathlenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitathlenoko|thitathlenoko]] || [[word:jitathlenoko|jitathlenoko]] || [[word:shitathlenoko|shitathlenoko]] || [[word:kitathlenoko|kitathlenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutathlenoko|thuthutathlenoko]] || [[word:jujutathlenoko|jujutathlenoko]] || [[word:shushutathlenoko|shushutathlenoko]] || [[word:kukutathlenoko|kukutathlenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotathlenoko|thothotathlenoko]] || [[word:jojotathlenoko|jojotathlenoko]] || [[word:shoshotathlenoko|shoshotathlenoko]] || [[word:kokotathlenoko|kokotathlenoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotathlenoko|thotathlenoko]] || [[word:jotathlenoko|jotathlenoko]] || [[word:shotathlenoko|shotathlenoko]] || [[word:kotathlenoko|kotathlenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tathlenoko|th忙tathlenoko]] || [[word:j忙tathlenoko|j忙tathlenoko]] || [[word:sh忙tathlenoko|sh忙tathlenoko]] || [[word:k忙tathlenoko|k忙tathlenoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatathlenoko|thatathlenoko]] || [[word:jatathlenoko|jatathlenoko]] || [[word:shatathlenoko|shatathlenoko]] || [[word:katathlenoko|katathlenoko]]
|}
